reviews.outcome: Approved. Change adds a client-side 📅 Range: date fine-filter to /sa-tracker, matching the existing filter on /technician. fromDate/toDate promoted from retired hardcoded empty-string consts to useState; dateScopedRows updated to filter by invoice_date (consistent with technician page). No new routes, module keys, DB tables, or RBAC changes. No mobile surface affected. CURRENT_STATE.md assessed — no new surface facts to record. CHANGE_LOG.md entry added 2026-07-03. TypeScript: tsc --noEmit clean.
